projectDescription: CLI for running large numbers of coding agents in parallel with git worktrees
keyFeatures: Run multiple AI coding agents in parallel
Automatic Git worktree management for isolated development
Tmux session management for each agent
Automatic development server setup with port management
Real-time monitoring of agent status and code changes
Automatic handling of agent prompts and confirmations
Easy checkpoint and merge of agent changes
publicApiSurface: uzi prompt (alias: p) - Create new agent sessions
uzi auto (alias: a) - Auto-handle agent prompts
uzi ls (alias: l) - List active agent sessions
uzi broadcast (alias: b) - Send messages to all agents
uzi run (alias: r) - Execute commands in all sessions
uzi checkpoint (alias: c) - Merge agent changes
uzi kill (alias: k) - Terminate agent sessions
uzi reset - Remove all Uzi data
